zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bradford於1374年出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Robert Bradford-Wetewode18歲，母親Agnes Wetewode19歲。他於1412年與Margaret Swynhowe在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1420年9月18日在他的家鄉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bradford于1374年出生在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Robert Bradford-Wetewode18岁，母亲Agnes Wetewode19岁。他于1412年与Margaret Swynhowe在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1420年9月18日在他的家乡享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bradford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places, large and small, called Bradford; in particular the city in Yorkshire, which originally rose to prosperity as a wool town. There are others in Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Greater Manchester, Norfolk, Somerset, Cheshire, Wiltshire and elsewhere. They are all named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + ford ‘ford’.

History: This name was brought independently to North American by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Bradford (1590–1657), born in Austerfield in South Yorkshire, England, the son of a yeoman farmer, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who emigrated to North America on the Mayflower in 1620. He was a signer of the Mayflower Compact and in 1621 he was elected governor of Plymouth colony, being re-elected thirty times. Another William Bradford (1663–1752), printer, came from Barnwell, Leicestershire, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in 1685, subsequently moving to New York, where he set up a printing press and founded a paper mill. His grandson, also called William Bradford (1721–91), was known as ‘the patriot printer’, famous for his Philadelphia newspaper, which among other things denounced the Stamp Act, "which no American can mention without abhorrence".

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bradford was born in 1374, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, his father, Robert Bradford-Wetewode, was 18 and his mother, Agnes Wetewode, was 19. He married Margaret Swynhowe in 1412, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 18 September 1420, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bradford est né en 1374, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bradford-Wetewode, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wetewode, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Swynhowe en 1412, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1420, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bradford è nato il nel 1374 nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Robert Bradford-Wetewode, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wetewode, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Swynhowe nel 1412, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 18 settembre 1420, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bradfordが1374年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Robert Bradford-Wetewodeは18歳，母Agnes Wetewodeは19歳であった。1412年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインでMargaret Swynhoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1420年9月18日に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bradford(이)가 1374년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bradford-Wetewode(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wetewode(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Margaret Swynhowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 9월 18일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bradford nasceu em 1374, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Bradford-Wetewode, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wetewode, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Swynhowe em 1412, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1420, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bradford родился в 1374 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bradford-Wetewode было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wetewode, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Swynhowe в 1412 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 18 сентября 1420 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bradford nació en 1374, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Bradford-Wetewode, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnes Wetewode, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Swynhowe en 1412, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1420, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
